subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Us unto them that dwell in the heavens and on earth, that the verses of the Lord of Names may draw them unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی من فی السموات و الارضین لتجذبهم آیات مالک الاسماء و
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @proclamation to the people of the world, @Primal Will and the Word; Remembrance; Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @sacrifice of the Manifestation of God redeems the world
